changeSet.author: nexus-net63
changeSet.comment: Grant nexus_svc role the DML privileges it needs on the nexus and t1 schemas. REQUIRED: nexus_svc must exist before first migration; if missing, GRANT fails loudly and migration aborts (fail-fast — no silent skip). runAlways: re-executed on every startup so a role created after the first migration is automatically provisioned on the next restart.
